title: Saint Francis and the Animals

description.text: One of my favorite painting projects, in the dining room of a very eclectic Viennese apartment, put together by designer Omar Zevallos. I painted over 35 animals, birds and insects from around the world, all on their way to see their patron saint: Saint Francis (depicted in a large oil painting in the middle of the room).

location: Dining Room. Private Home. Vienna, Austria
